ccel.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

source.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

title: Concerning æon or age.

source.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: He created the ages Who Himself was before the ages, Whom the divine David thus addresses, From age to age Thou art.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: The divine apostle also says, Through Whom He created the ages.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: It must then be understood that the word age has various meanings, for it denotes many things.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: The life of each man is called an age.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Again, a period of a thousand years is called an age.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Again, the whole course of the present life is called an age: also the future life, the immortal life after the resurrection, is spoken of as an age.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Again, the word age is used to denote, not time nor yet a part of time as measured by the movement and course of the sun, that is to say, composed of days and nights, but the sort of temporal motion and interval that is co-extensive with eternity.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: For age is to things eternal just what time is to things temporal.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Seven ages of this world are spoken of, that is, from the creation of the heaven and earth till the general consummation and resurrection of men.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: For there is a partial consummation, viz., the death of each man: but there is also a general and complete consummation, when the general resurrection of men will come to pass.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: And the eighth age is the age to come.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Before the world was formed, when there was as yet no sun dividing day from night, there was not an age such as could be measured, but there was the sort of temporal motion and interval that is co-extensive with eternity.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: And in this sense there is but one age, and God is spoken of as αἰ& 240·νιος and προαιώνιος, for the age or æon itself is His creation.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: For God, Who alone is without beginning, is Himself the Creator of all things, whether age or any other existing thing.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: And when I say God, it is evident that I mean the Father and His Only begotten Son, our Lord, Jesus Christ, and His all-holy Spirit, our one God.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: But we speak also of ages of ages, inasmuch as the seven ages of the present world include many ages in the sense of lives of men, and the one age embraces all the ages, and the present and the future are spoken of as age of age.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Further, everlasting (i.e. αἰ& 240·νιος) life and everlasting punishment prove that the age or æon to come is unending.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: For time will not be counted by days and nights even after the resurrection, but there will rather be one day with no evening, wherein the Sun of Justice will shine brightly on the just, but for the sinful there will be night profound and limitless.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: In what way then will the period of one thousand years be counted which, according to Origen, is required for the complete restoration?

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Of all the ages, therefore, the sole creator is God Who hath also created the universe and Who was before the ages.
